title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.029 - Attorney at law may be employed for legal advice and representation
text:
103.029.  Attorney at law may be employed for legal advice and representation. — The board may employ or contract with an attorney at law or firm of attorneys to be the legal advisor of the board and to represent the board in all legal proceedings.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 14)
